name: Curvature
description: CAT(κ), Alexandrov curvature. Comparison triangles. Nonpositive curvature, Hadamard.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: CATκ\nAlexandrov comparison"]
    D2["Def: Comparison triangle\nM²_κ ref"]
    D3["Def: Curvature bounded\nabove/below"]
    D4["Def: Hadamard\nCAT0, simply conn"]
    T1["Thm: CAT0⇒unique geod\nnonbranching"]
    T2["Thm: Hadamard–Cartan\nsimply conn CAT0"]
    T3["Thm: Reshetnyak\ngluing CAT0"]
    T4["Thm: Bruhat–Tits\nbuildings CAT0"]
    T5["Thm: Gromov δ-hyperbolic\nthin triangles"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> D1
    D3 --> D1
    D4 --> T2
    T1 --> T2
    T5 --> D3
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
